segments.narrative: El nombre resuena. Un fenómeno. Un rey.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic cinematic shot of Cristiano Ronaldo performing his iconic 'Siu!' celebration, mid-air, back to camera, stadium lights blazing, slight lens flare, dramatic backlighting, photorealistic, 8k.

Ultra close-up, slow-motion shot of Cristiano Ronaldo's intense, focused face during a match, sweat glistening on his forehead, determined expression, sharp focus on his eyes, shallow depth of field, cinematic, 8k.

Gritty, slightly desaturated handheld camera shot of a young boy (approx. 8-10 years old) playing football on a dusty, uneven cobblestone street in a narrow alley in Funchal, Madeira. Old, colorful buildings in the background, late afternoon sun creating long shadows, cinematic, photorealistic.

Close-up, low-angle shot of a pair of small, worn, dirty hands of a child clutching an old, patched-up leather football, early morning light filtering through, symbolizing dreams, soft focus on the background, photorealistic, cinematic.

Fast-paced, motion-blurred shot of a young Cristiano Ronaldo (teenager) in a green Sporting Lisbon jersey, dribbling at high speed past a defender, a burst of energy, stadium lights overhead, dynamic, photorealistic, action shot.

segments.narrative: ...y Manchester United lo convirtió en estrella.
segments.visual_prompt: Iconic, vibrant shot of Cristiano Ronaldo in his prime Manchester United red jersey, celebrating a goal with open arms, a youthful, ecstatic smile, Old Trafford crowd cheering in the blurred background, golden hour lighting, cinematic, 8k.

segments.narrative: Pero fue en el Real Madrid...
segments.visual_prompt: Sweeping wide aerial drone shot of the illuminated Santiago Bernabéu stadium at dusk, city lights twinkling in the background, grand and majestic, reflecting Real Madrid's prestige, cinematic, 8k.

Dynamic supercut of three quick action shots: 1) Ronaldo scoring a powerful header for Real Madrid, 2) Ronaldo unleashing a free-kick, ball blurring, 3) Ronaldo celebrating a goal with his Real Madrid teammates. All shots are photorealistic, high-energy, and lit with stadium lights.

Ultra slow-motion, high-frame-rate shot of a perfectly struck football ripping through the net, water droplets exploding outwards from the impact point, powerful, dramatic lighting, sharp focus, cinematic, 8k.

Close-up, low-angle shot of a gleaming UEFA Champions League trophy, camera slowly panning across its intricate details, reflections of stadium lights on its surface, symbolizing ultimate achievement, luxurious, cinematic, 8k.

Cinematic shot of Cristiano Ronaldo intensely focused while performing heavy weightlifting in a sleek, modern gym, sweat glistening, strong key lighting emphasizing his muscular physique, dark background, dedicated, photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up shot of Cristiano Ronaldo's powerfully muscled thigh, veins visible, in motion during a sprint or drill, dynamic and raw, highlighting physical perfection and dedication, dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
Side profile close-up of Cristiano Ronaldo's face, utterly focused and determined during a high-stakes match, sweat on his brow, eyes locked on the ball, intense and resolute, cinematic, 8k.

Montage of diverse fans from different continents (e.g., child in Asia, adult in Africa, teenager in Europe) enthusiastically cheering and holding up 'CR7' signs or jerseys, vibrant and energetic, global appeal, documentary style.

Stylized, sleek graphic animation of the 'CR7' logo shimmering and expanding, seamlessly integrated with a subtle, glowing world map in the background, symbolizing global reach and brand power, modern, digital art style.

Heartwarming shot of a young child (approx. 6-8 years old) in a full Cristiano Ronaldo jersey, looking up with wide-eyed awe at a large, brightly lit poster of Ronaldo in a dimly lit room, conveying inspiration and dreams, soft, warm lighting, cinematic.

Dramatic silhouette shot of Cristiano Ronaldo walking confidently off a football pitch towards a vivid sunset, the stadium lights slowly dimming behind him, symbolizing transition and legacy, poignant, cinematic, 8k.

Slow zoom-out from a vibrant, detailed street art mural of Cristiano Ronaldo on a worn brick wall in a bustling urban environment, people walking by in the foreground, showing his cultural impact beyond the stadium, gritty yet inspiring, photorealistic street art.

Powerful, direct, and iconic cinematic portrait of Cristiano Ronaldo. He is looking straight into the camera with a confident, slightly reflective expression. Strong, dramatic key lighting on his face, dark, blurred background, timeless, 8k, photorealistic.
